gateOrder.label: Manifest and weight identity are complete, or the manifest explicitly references a hosted weight pack.
A deterministic runtime verification receipt is committed.
Public support has a Hugging Face repo, revision, and artifact path.
Compare JSON and summary SVG receipts exist for the lane.
Preferred architecture is selected only from benchmark receipts.
